title: Assets Improved
body:
Some assets are outdated, and some could just use a little change or improvement. So this resource pack is for improving and changing the assets of the game for a better experience. 

Need a good Minecraft server? Get 15% off your first month at Kinetic Hosting with code ADELHEIDALLIUMS15.
